description_for_human: Look up CVE vulnerability details from the CIRCL CVE Search database (mirrors NIST NVD and MITRE). Retrieve CVSS scores, severity ratings, affected products, and descriptions for any CVE identifier.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to retrieve detailed vulnerability information from CIRCL CVE Search. Invoke this plugin when the user asks about: a specific CVE identifier (e.g. CVE-2024-21413, CVE-2021-44228), the severity or CVSS score of a vulnerability, what products are affected by a CVE, or a description of what a CVE does. Call the getCveById operation with the cveId path parameter set to the exact CVE identifier (e.g. CVE-2024-21413). The CVSS v3.1 base score and severity are in containers.adp[].metrics[].cvssV3_1.baseScore and baseSeverity. The vulnerability description is in containers.cna.descriptions[0].value. The affected vendor and product are in containers.cna.affected[0].vendor and .product.
